STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL — NON-PUBLIC — Deal Codename: Project Date Palm (embargo until 25 May 2026, 09:00 AST)
Parties: Rimal Al-Tamayuz Holding LLC (CR: 2050-xx77-013, Riyadh) as Buyer, and Al-Qirwan Foods CJSC (Issuer; CR: 1010-x3x9-882) as Seller/Target.
Transaction: Acquisition of 60% of issued shares of Al-Qirwan Foods CJSC for SAR 240,000,000 (SAR 180,000,000 cash; SAR 60,000,000 contingent earn-out over 24 months).
Approvals: internal board consents; no-objection from the Saudi securities regulator for market-conduct compliance; local exchange disclosure clearance prior to Closing.
Definitive agreements: Share Purchase Agreement (SPA), Shareholders’ Agreement, Transitional Services Agreement; target signing date 12 Dhul‑Qa’dah 1447H.
PDPL/data: Buyer to receive only masked personal data (Iqama/ID digits redacted like **-**34-19**); any cross-border transfer of HR files to the cloud processor requires prior approval by the n a t i o n a l   d a t a   a u t h o r i t y.
Data room access URL: https://secure.alqirwan.example/room?p=proj=DP&cr=2050xx77013 (note OCR shows two “O” characters in 2OO5O, not zeros).
No Material Adverse Change: customary MAC applies; for clarity, general economic/market conditions, changes in law, or pandemic-related supply disruptions shall not be deemed a MAC.
Public-source reference: the 2022 listing rules available on the exchange website are general guidance only and do not disclose this transaction.
Board memo contact: H.E. Mr. Samer Al‑Faris, Chair; samer.alfaris@rimal-tamayuz.example; +966-5x-xxx-xx41.
Non-public IR workflow: draft announcement to be prepared for the local exchange in Arabic and English, with placeholder wording “operational excellence program” not previously disclosed.
Closing mechanics: escrow at Desert Crescent Bank (fictional) IBAN-like ref: SA0x 8000 33xx x3x3 0099 001 (illustrative only), settlement T+3 from disclosure clearance.
Compliance note: employee/vendor national IDs (Iqama) shall be truncated on invoices; only aggregated HR counts will be shared; no full-face images will leave the Kingdom without permit.
lowercase pm note: next: send draft to legal, re-check numbers, then archive in sharepoint; team spa day remains penciled but is unrelated and will be canceled if this leaks.
Exclusivity/standstill: 60 days from signing; break fee SAR 6,000,000 if Seller signs a competing term sheet; non-binding except for confidentiality, costs, and governing law (KSA).
